name: Rosewill VMG 1000W 80+ Gold, ATX 3.0 & 3.1 Compatible, Full Modular Low-Noise Power Supply, PCIe 5.1 12V-2x6 Connector, 100% Japanese Electrolytic Capacitor, 120mm FDB Silent Fan - VMG1000
